# Yuto Tachibana (立花 優斗)

> Engineering Capitalist based in Tokyo, Japan — an engineer who builds and invests. Personal profile and link collection.

## About

Yuto Tachibana began his career at NTT COMWARE, working on new businesses applying cutting-edge technology for government agencies. He then joined several startups as an engineering manager and head of development, leading 0-to-1 product creation, team building, and growth. In 2022, he served as tech lead and worked on business development at a newly established DeNA joint venture. In 2025, he joined Delight Ventures. Today he works hands-on as a CTO for portfolio companies while also investing himself. As an engineer-turned-capitalist, he builds businesses together with founders—from hypothesis to implementation.

## Current Positions

### Full-time
- Delight Ventures, Inc. - https://www.delight-ventures.com/en/team/yuto-tachibana

## Data Format

This site's profile data is available in structured JSON format at:
- https://tachibanayu24.com/me.json

The JSON schema is defined at:
- https://tachibanayu24.com/me.schema.json

## Interests

Startups, Fitness, Sauna, Cooking, Rabbits, Shogi, Real Estate, Stock Market, Comedy, AI in Large Industries, AI-native funds

## Language

This site supports both English and Japanese. Content is managed through me.json with language-specific fields.
